InclusionRules.name: 1460d prior observation
InclusionRules.description: a minimum of 4 years of follow-up before the first diagnosis of an IBD in the claims data by any provider

InclusionRules.name: No prior sulfasalazine unless to treat RA
No prior methotrexate unless to treat RA, PsO, PsA
No prior TNFai unless to treat RA, PsO, PsA, AS, HS, pyoderma gangrenosum
No prior usekinumab unless to treat PsO, PsA
No prior tofacitinib unless to treat RA, PsA
No prior natalizumab unless to treat MS
no other IBD therapies [-9999, 1]
InclusionRules.description: no prior IBD therapies except for another indication (e.g., RA treated with TNFai)

InclusionRules.name: colonoscopy, sigmoidoscopy, or bowel resection in [-42, 0d]
InclusionRules.description: prior colonoscopy, sigmoidoscopy, capsule endoscopy, or bowel resection [-42, 0d]
